title: Your spending through the decades – consumers price index (CPI) basket changes 2020 | Stats NZ
content:
## Your spending through the decades – consumers price index (CPI) basket changes 2020
23 October 2020, 11:30am
Your spending though the decades – consumers price index (CPI) basket changes 2020 illustrates some of the items that have come in and out of the CPI basket through the decades – from the 1960s through to 2020.
In 2020 people are spending more on vaping, including e-cigarettes. But they are spending less on fading technology such as cordless phones, CDs and travel guides.
A downloadable A3 PDF is available below the infographic.

## Text alternative for infographic Your spending through the decades – consumers price index (CPI) basket changes 2020
Your spending through the decades illustrates some of the items that have come in and out of the CPI basket through the decades – from the 1960s through to 2020. People are spending more on vaping, including e-cigarettes. But they are spending less on fading technology such as cordless phones, CDs and travel guides.

- LP records (33 rpm).
